<?php namespace Resend\ValueObjects; use Resend\Contracts\Stringable; final class ApiKey implements Stringable { /** * Create a new API Key value object. */ public function __construct( public readonly string $apiKey ) { // } /** * Create a new API Key value object from the given API Key. */ public static function from(string $apiKey): self { return new self($apiKey); } /** * Returns the string representation of the object. */ public function toString(): string { return $this->apiKey; } }
